mapper.select: select * from recommendation where user_id = #{userId} order by score desc
mapper.insert: insert into recommendation(user_id, rec_type, content_id, reason, score, is_clicked, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{recType}, #{contentId}, #{reason}, #{score}, #{isClicked}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: update recommendation set is_clicked = 1 where rec_id = #{recId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from recommendation where is_clicked = 1
select rec_type as type, count(*) as total, sum(is_clicked) as clicked, ifnull(sum(is_clicked) * 100.0 / count(*), 0) as rate from recommendation group by rec_type
